---
title: "Fluids"
---

Fluids
Physiologic Properties of Resuscitation Fluids
Na K Ca Mg Cl Acetate Lactate Gluconate Bicarb Osmolarity
mEq/L mEq/L mEq/L mEq/L mEq/L mEq/L mEq/L mEq/L mEq/L mOsm/L
mg/dL mg/dL
mmol/L mmol/L
Plasma 2.2-2.6 0.8-1.0
135-
3.5-5 4.4-5.2 1.0-1.2 94-111 - 1.2 - - 275-295
1.1-1.3 0.4-0.5
Na Cl
154 - - - 154 - - - - 308
LR 2.7
130 4 5.4 - 109 - 28 - - 273
1.4
Plasma- 3.0
Lyte 140 5 - 3.7 98 27 - 23 - 294
1.5
0.45%
Na Cl +
141 - - - 72 - - - 70 283
Na
Bicarb
